game_info.title: Square Bird Tower
game_info.concept:
Build your egg tower and pass the barriers, but beware! Keep it smooth, on the right timing and the right level. Touch the grass 3 times with perfect landing to reach the Square Bird Fever mode.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/square-bird-flappy-chicken/id1435729435

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Build your egg tower and pass the barriers, but beware! Keep it smooth, on the right timing and the right level. Touch the grass 3 times with perfect landing to reach the Square Bird Fever mode.
game_info.description: Control a square bird that lays square eggs to build a tower and overcome obstacles. Avoid hitting walls with the bird's body. If your egg tower hits a wall, the eggs break but you survive. Land on the ground 3 times to enter FEVER MODE, where you become invincible and smash through barriers! Reach the finish line to win.
game_info.controls:
- Space / Up Arrow: Lay an egg to build height
- Left/Right Arrow: Adjust horizontal position (minor adjustment)
- Z: Activate Fever ability manually (debug/cheat)
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause Game
- R: Restart Game

TEST_1.test_description: Testing the core mechanic: laying eggs to clear obstacles.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot detects upcoming obstacles within a specific range. It calculates the height of the obstacle and automatically presses Space to stack enough eggs to clear the bird's body over the obstacle height, maintaining a small buffer.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The bird should successfully clear all obstacles, reach the finish line, and trigger the "GAME_OVER_WIN" state.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing collision and game over state.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot does nothing (simulates an AFK player). It lets the bird run into the first wall.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The bird hits the first wall, and the game phase transitions to "GAME_OVER_LOSE".

TEST_3.strategy_description: The bot plays perfectly but tries to land on the ground between obstacles intentionally to trigger the landing counter. It verifies if Fever mode activates after 3 landings.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Fever mode flag in gameState becomes true, and the bird smashes through obstacles.
TEST_3.strategy: The bot plays perfectly but tries to land on the ground between obstacles intentionally to trigger the landing counter. It verifies if Fever mode activates after 3 landings.
TEST_3.expected: Fever mode flag in gameState becomes true, and the bird smashes through obstacles.
